data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of freezing membership, but the evidence does not provide any direct confirmation of this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the ability to freeze membership for up to 3 months, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate how this is implemented or verified. The absence of specific evidence regarding the freezing of membership leads to a clear gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of freezing membership while keeping credits and pausing billing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the freezing of membership functionality.
